seoTitle: Preston vs Promised Land — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Preston and Promised Land. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Preston vs Promised Land: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Preston and Promised Land.
heading: Preston vs Promised Land — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Preston, Tasmania and Promised Land, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Promised Land has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Preston (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Preston or Promised Land safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Preston has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Promised Land scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Preston scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. Promised Land scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Preston or Promised Land?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Promised Land has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
